checks.evidence: The submit button outline is removed in keyboard focus.
checks.impact: Sighted keyboard users cannot identify the active control.
checks.fix: Restore a visible focus indicator with sufficient contrast.
checks.verification: Tab through the form and inspect every focusable control.

checks.evidence: At 320 CSS px equivalent, fields stack without horizontal scrolling.

checks.fix: Expose status through an appropriate live region and test it.
checks.verification: Submit with at least one supported screen reader.

notes: The report is not a declaration of complete WCAG conformance.
